mapper.select: SELECT id, title, description, status, close_at, settle_due_at, total_pool, initial_virtual_liquidity, created_at, updated_at FROM market WHERE id = #{marketId} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT id, market_id, option_code, option_text, display_order, range_min, range_max, min_inclusive, max_inclusive, virtual_pool_amount, real_pool_amount, total_contract_quantity, current_price, prediction_count, is_result, created_at, updated_at FROM market_option WHERE market_id = #{marketId} ORDER BY display_order ASC, id ASC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM market_price_history history JOIN market_option ON market_option.id = history.option_id AND market_option.market_id = history.market_id WHERE history.market_id = #{marketId}
AND history.option_id = #{optionId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO market ( title, description, category, answer_type, metric_unit, judge_data_source, judge_criteria, judge_date, status, close_at, settle_due_at, total_pool, fee_rate, fee_amount, settlement_pool, initial_virtual_liquidity, price_model, created_by, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{description}, #{category}, #{answerType}, #{metricUnit}, #{judgeDataSource}, #{judgeCriteria}, #{judgeDate}, #{status}, #{closeAt}, #{settleDueAt}, #{totalPool}, #{feeRate}, #{feeAmount}, #{settlementPool}, #{initialVirtualLiquidity}, #{priceModel}, #{createdBy}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )

INSERT INTO market_option ( market_id, option_code, option_text, display_order, range_min, range_max, min_inclusive, max_inclusive, virtual_pool_amount, real_pool_amount, total_contract_quantity, current_price, prediction_count, is_result, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES
( #{option.marketId}, #{option.optionCode}, #{option.optionText}, #{option.displayOrder}, #{option.rangeMin}, #{option.rangeMax}, #{option.minInclusive}, #{option.maxInclusive}, #{option.virtualPoolAmount}, #{option.realPoolAmount}, #{option.totalContractQuantity}, #{option.currentPrice}, #{option.predictionCount}, #{option.isResult}, #{option.createdAt}, #{option.updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM market_prediction WHERE market_id = #{marketId} AND status IN ('POINT_PENDING', 'POINT_UNKNOWN')
mapper.update: UPDATE market SET result_option_id = #{resultOptionId}, result_value = #{resultValue}, result_text = #{resultText}, status = 'CLOSED', updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{marketId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO market_prediction ( market_id, option_id, member_id, point_amount, status, point_spend_idempotency_key, attempt_no, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{marketId}, #{optionId}, #{memberId}, #{pointAmount}, #{status}, #{pointSpendIdempotencyKey}, #{attemptNo}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE market_prediction SET option_id = #{optionId}, point_amount = #{pointAmount}, price_snapshot = NULL, contract_quantity = NULL, expected_payout_per_contract_snapshot = NULL, expected_multiplier_snapshot = NULL, status = 'POINT_PENDING', point_spend_idempotency_key = #{pointSpendIdempotencyKey}, attempt_no = #{attemptNo}, fail_reason = NULL, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{predictionId} AND status = 'FAILED'
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM market WHERE id = #{marketId} AND deleted_at IS NULL FOR UPDATE
SELECT * FROM market_option WHERE market_id = #{marketId} ORDER BY id ASC FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO market_price_history ( market_id, option_id, prediction_id, price_before, price_after, real_pool_before, real_pool_after, contract_quantity_before, contract_quantity_after, event_type, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES
( #{history.marketId}, #{history.optionId}, #{history.predictionId}, #{history.priceBefore}, #{history.priceAfter}, #{history.realPoolBefore}, #{history.realPoolAfter}, #{history.contractQuantityBefore}, #{history.contractQuantityAfter}, #{history.eventType}, #{history.createdAt}, #{history.updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE market_prediction SET price_snapshot = #{priceSnapshot}, contract_quantity = #{contractQuantity}, status = 'CONFIRMED', updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{predictionId} AND status = 'POINT_PENDING'
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM market_prediction WHERE market_id = #{marketId} AND status = 'CONFIRMED' ORDER BY id ASC FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO market_settlement ( market_id, result_option_id, total_pool, fee_rate, fee_amount, settlement_pool, winning_contract_quantity, payout_per_contract, burned_point_amount, status, settled_by, settled_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{marketId}, #{resultOptionId}, #{totalPool}, #{feeRate}, #{feeAmount}, #{settlementPool}, #{winningContractQuantity}, #{payoutPerContract}, #{burnedPointAmount}, #{status}, #{settledBy}, #{settledAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )

INSERT INTO market_settlement_detail ( settlement_id, prediction_id, member_id, original_point_amount, contract_quantity, payout_per_contract, settled_amount, profit_amount, status, idempotency_key, fail_reason, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES
( #{detail.settlementId}, #{detail.predictionId}, #{detail.memberId}, #{detail.originalPointAmount}, #{detail.contractQuantity}, #{detail.payoutPerContract}, #{detail.settledAmount}, #{detail.profitAmount}, #{detail.status}, #{detail.idempotencyKey}, #{detail.failReason}, #{detail.createdAt}, #{detail.updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM market_settlement_detail WHERE settlement_id = #{settlementId} ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE market SET fee_amount = #{feeAmount}, settlement_pool = #{settlementPool}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{marketId} AND status = 'SETTLEMENT_IN_PROGRESS' AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE market SET status = 'SETTLED', settled_at = #{updatedAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{marketId} AND status = 'SETTLEMENT_IN_PROGRESS' AND deleted_at IS NULL
